variants: Roshni Rampersad has been influential in her academic field, with her research published by Kindling Parlor Press. She possesses significant credentials, including a Frostcall Instructor Permit, which enables her to teach specialized programs. Roshni received mentorship from Ivana Sokolova, her doctoral advisor, who guided her through her educational journey. Her research projects have been supported by the Topaz Lantern Fund, highlighting their importance and relevance. In addition to her scholarly activities, Roshni is dedicated to community engagement as a Canopy Watcher at Hawkfield Friends, focusing on conservation efforts.
